subcodes.first_line: Verily, the drop sought to withhold the ocean, and the atom desired to veil the sun with the clay of idle fancies and vain imaginings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان القطره ارادت ان تمنع البحر و الذره ان تستر الشمس بطین الظنون و الاوهام قد
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
